hero.title: Your Journey to
hero.subtitle: Japan Begins Here
hero.description: Nihon Moments is your trusted partner in making your dream of studying in Japan a reality. We guide you through every step of the journey, from application to arrival, with personalized support and expert guidance.

services.title: Our Core Services
services.subtitle: We make the process of studying in Japan smooth and stress-free, providing comprehensive support at every stage of your journey.

applicationGuidance.title: Application Guidance
applicationGuidance.description: Navigate the complex application process with our expert guidance. We help you prepare all necessary documents, meet deadlines, and present your best self to Japanese institutions.

coe.title: Certificate of Eligibility (COE)
coe.description: We streamline the COE application process, handling all the paperwork and coordination with Japanese immigration authorities to ensure a smooth and successful application.

interviewPrep.title: Interview Preparation
interviewPrep.description: Build confidence with our comprehensive interview coaching. We provide mock interviews, cultural insights, and personalized feedback to help you excel in your admissions interviews.

support.title: Why Choose Nihon Moments?
support.subtitle: We're not just consultants; we're your partners in success. Our comprehensive approach ensures you have everything you need to thrive in Japan.

personalized.title: Personalized Approach
personalized.description: Every student receives individual attention tailored to their unique goals and circumstances. Our dedicated counselors work closely with you to create a personalized roadmap to success.

proven.title: Proven Success
proven.description: Join hundreds of successful students who have achieved their dreams through our guidance. Their stories inspire us and prove that with the right support, anything is possible.

students.title: Meet Our Successful Students
students.subtitle: COE approved students now studying at top Japanese universities

whyChoose.title: Why Students Choose Us
whyChoose.subtitle: Our commitment to excellence and personalized care sets us apart from the rest.

expertise.title: Expert Guidance
expertise.description: Individual guidance tailored to your unique goals and dreams

success.title: Proven Success
success.description: Hundreds of students successfully placed in top Japanese institutions

cta.title: Ready to Start Your Japanese Journey?
cta.subtitle: Take the first step towards your dream of studying in Japan. Our team is ready to guide you through every step of the process.
